title: Complete operator and developer documentation
description: Restructure and expand the documentation so an operator can build, install, configure, start, stop, and troubleshoot TheWatcher, and a developer can extend every component end to end.
acceptance_criteria: README provides a concise entry point and links to the complete docs set.
Docs cover build steps, install steps, foreground running, service running, start/stop, logging, and troubleshooting.
A configuration document lists server and agent config paths, file formats, CLI overrides, and every config option.
Every component has documentation: server, agent, common protocol, dashboard, storage, tests, scripts, and third-party build wrappers.
Developer docs explain how to add a new collector end to end.

tasks.title: Create docs map and operator docs
tasks.description: Update README.md and create/expand installation, configuration, running, architecture, dashboard, logging, and service documentation.
acceptance_criteria: Operator can find build, install, configure, start, stop, and uninstall commands.
Configuration paths and options are explicit for Windows, Linux, and BSD.
Docs describe that agents initiate connections and submit data.
tasks.implementation_notes: Use docs/configuration.md, docs/installation.md, docs/running.md, and docs/architecture.md as primary docs. Update existing docs/service-installation.md, docs/dashboard.md, docs/logging.md, and README.md to avoid stale agent.json references.

tasks.title: Create developer extension docs
tasks.description: Document repository layout, build targets, test targets, protocol/storage/dashboard extension points, and the full workflow for adding a collector.
acceptance_criteria: Developer docs list important Bazel targets.
Adding a collector covers metrics model, collector class, agent registration, dashboard model/status UI, tests, and docs.
Third-party build wrapper docs remain available.
tasks.implementation_notes: Expand docs/collector-contract.md and create docs/development.md. Keep docs/bazel-build.md and docs/build-environment.md aligned with the new entry points.

tasks.title: Release bookkeeping and verification
tasks.description: Bump MODULE.bazel, update CHANGELOG.md, complete the plan, and run lightweight documentation verification.
acceptance_criteria: Docs no longer contain stale agent.json references except compatibility notes.

integration: Search docs for stale config and target names.

tasks.implementation_notes: Use Select-String checks for agent.json/server.exe/old target names and review intentional compatibility mentions.

nodes.label: Create docs map and operator docs

edges.label: Developer docs link back to operator/component docs.
